top3.sql:
SELECT pa.sprint_speed, pa.agility, pa.acceleration
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Alexis Blin';

SELECT pa.sprint_speed, pa.agility, pa.acceleration
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Alexis Blin';

SELECT pa.sprint_speed, pa.agility, pa.acceleration
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Alexis Blin'
ORDER BY pa.date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT pa.sprint_speed, pa.agility, pa.acceleration
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Alexis Blin';

SELECT pa.sprint_speed, pa.agility, pa.acceleration
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Alexis Blin'
ORDER BY pa.date DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT pa.sprint_speed, pa.agility, pa.acceleration
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Alexis Blin';
